Documentation for this format

Options Sets

Answer options for overview.sponsor

  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-mrid-sponsor-cs#bhp ("Behavioral Health and Performance")

Answer options for overview.discipline

  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-mrid-discipline-cs#behavioral ("Behavior and Performance")

Answer options for family-support-metrics.support-system

  • Strong - extensive support network
  • Adequate - sufficient support available
  • Limited - some gaps in support
  • Insufficient - significant support needs

Answer options for family-support-metrics.communication-frequency

  • Daily
  • Several times per week
  • Weekly
  • As available

Answer options for family-support-metrics.dependent-care

  • No dependents
  • Arrangements finalized
  • Arrangements in progress
  • Assistance needed

Answer options for family-support-metrics.financial-preparedness

  • Fully prepared
  • Adequately prepared
  • Some concerns
  • Assistance needed

Answer options for postflight-activities.reintegration.status

  • Successful - no concerns
  • Progressing well
  • Some challenges - support provided
  • Significant challenges - ongoing support

Answer options for data-delivery.archive

  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-data-archive-cs#emr ("Electronic Medical Record")

extension.valueString: The astronaut/crewmember subject of this evaluation

name: MEDB75FamilySupport
title: MEDB 7.5 Family Support Evaluation
description: NASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for family support evaluation. Assesses family support systems, identifies needs, and coordinates support services throughout mission phases.
purpose: Evaluate astronaut family support systems, identify needs, and coordinate appropriate support services before, during, and after spaceflight.
copyright: NASA Johnson Space Center - Medical Requirements Integration Documents (MRIDs)

initial.valueString: Evaluate family support systems, identify needs, and coordinate support services throughout mission phases.

item.text: Number and Type of Crew Members Required

initial.valueString: Orientation for family members on mission timeline, communication options, support resources, and emergency procedures
